label: 1279_edey_malcolm edey_malcolm_gertrude tumpelgugerell
description: The Reserve Bank of Australia addressed the challenges and regulatory landscape for retail payments in Australia through speeches by Assistant Governor Malcolm Edey, focusing on coordination issues and market dynamics.

newest_articles.title: Michele Bullock: Opening Statement to the Senate Economics Legislation Committee (Budget Estimates 2026–2027)
newest_articles.excerpt: I will briefly highlight some of the Bank's work on payments. Following our review of card payments, we announced three key changes. Surcharging on debit and credit cards should end from 1 October, we are lowering interchange fee caps on debit and consumer credit cards, and improving transparency around payment costs.…
